title: Bradburya arenaria
taxonomy: Bradburya arenaria is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is a type of shrub native to the Western Ghats region in India. This plant is part of the tribe Vernonieae within the Asteraceae family. Bradburya arenaria is further classified as a member of the subfamily Asteroideae. The classification of Bradburya arenaria is consistent with its physical and morphological characteristics.
